zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Coke於1445年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾多丁頓時，他的父親Robert Henry Coke26歲，母親Agnes Crisping21歲。他於1460年之前與Alice Folcard在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1520年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特多丁頓享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Coke于1445年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾多丁頓时，他的父亲Robert Henry Coke26岁，母亲Agnes Crisping21岁。他于1460年之前与Alice Folcard在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1520年在英国英格兰薩默塞特多丁頓享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Coke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Cook   or   Cocke  .
Americanized form of German   Koke   or   Koch  .

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Coke was born in 1445, in Dodington, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Robert Henry Coke, was 26 and his mother, Agnes Crisping, was 21. He married Alice Folcard before 1460, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1520, in Dodington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Coke est né en 1445, à Dodington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Henry Coke, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Crisping, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Alice Folcard avant 1460, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1520, à Dodington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Cokeが1445年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアドディントンで生まれた時，父Robert Henry Cokeは26歳，母Agnes Crispingは21歳であった。1460年以前にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでAlice Folcardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1520年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトドディントンで75歳で死去した。

ko.King's Lynn St John, Norfolk, England: 영국 노르폴크 킨그'스 린 스트 존
ko.Wiggenhall Saint Peter, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 위겐홀 세인트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Coke(이)가 1445년 영국 그루스스터실르 도딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Henry Coke(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Crisping(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1460년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Alice Folcard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 도딩턴에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.King's Lynn St John, Norfolk, England: кинг'с линн ст джон, норфолк, Англия
ru.Wiggenhall Saint Peter, Norfolk, England: вигенолл сеинт питир, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Coke родился в 1445 г. в местности додингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Henry Coke было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Crisping, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Folcard перед 1460 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1520 г. в местности додингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Coke nació en 1445, en Dodington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Henry Coke, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes Crisping, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Alice Folcard antes de 1460, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1520, en Dodington, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años.
